title: Senior Advocates Rajdeep Mazumder, Nilanjan Bhattacharyya, Dibyendra Ray named West Bengal law officers
description: The West Bengal government has appointed Senior Advocates Rajdeep Mazumder, Nilanjan Bhattacharyya and Dibyendra Narayan Ray as law officers for the State before the Calcutta High Court.Mazumder has been appointed as Additional Advocate General while Bhattacharyya and Ray as Senior Standing Counsel and Government Pleader respectively. The appointments have been made pursuant to the BJP coming to power in West Bengal. Mazumder had earlier been appointed Deputy Solicitor General of India for the C
